title: BtL SMP
description: A modpack focused around exploration, combat, and the create mod.
body:
Official Modpack for the Breaking the Loop SMP (BtL SMP) made for me and some friends to play on.

Ever wanted to have a unique world to explore, fight, and create the factory of your dreams while still keeping a somewhat vanilla feel?
Well do I have you covered!

This pack is made to ensure you not only have fun playing, but also not have to suffer from the endless cycle of 2 week Minecraft phases! Especially with lots of friends!

**As of v2.0, ftb quests, lib, and teams need to be added to the pack seperately.**
